prompt: PART A: Build WordPress theme at wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/ for skyyrose.co. Priority: immersive experience pages MUST mimic drakerelated.com — full-viewport rooms, beacon hotspots, room navigation, full-bleed scene backgrounds, product card modals. Then collection pages with rotating 3D logos, homepage, pre-order money page, remaining pages. PART B: Configure admin dashboard at frontend/ for devskyy.app — verify LLM Round Table, add Meshy API to 3D pipeline alongside Tripo, verify imagery pipeline, CREATE social media pipeline from scratch, verify WordPress and HuggingFace deployments. FINAL: One super significant upgrade across static pages + immersive pages + dashboard that is both cosmetically stunning AND measurably proven to drive sales.
